result.structure_evidence: Jubrail (Jay) Sweis DDS is sole AO/owner across LLC/PLLC/PC shells per NPPES: Jay Sweis D.D.S P.C. (NPI 1558704577, Chicago 60639), Jay Sweis DDS PC / Everyone's Family Dental (NPI 1386077741, Utica), Everyone's Family Dental St. Charles LLC (NPI 1235557109), Advocate Dental Group LLC (NPI 1710579958, Crystal Lake). 'Advocate Dental' and 'Everyone's Family Dental' are Sweis's own DBAs (name-chain). Several task addresses now show different operating practices (Geneva, St. Charles, Bloomingdale, Barrington) — likely closed/vacated/subleased shells.
